_publications._publicationTitle: Selumetinib normalizes Ras/MAPK signaling in clinically relevant neurofibromatosis type 1 minipig tissues in vivo.

_contextSnippet: However, optic nerve from untreated NF1 minipigs showed significantly elevated p-ERK compared to WT controls...Selumetinib treatment resulted in inhibition of p-ERK in optic nerve from NF1 minipigs (mean 60% inhibition), effectively reducing p-ERK to WT levels
details: Optic nerve from untreated NF1 minipigs showed significantly elevated p-ERK compared to WT controls, which was normalized to WT levels after selumetinib treatment (mean 60% inhibition)
